arts.ttl: Graham Potter stronger for Chelsea nightmare as West Ham boss prepares for first return
arts.sum: Former Blues boss heads back to Stamford Bridge in a better place and with no ill feeling, though closure not on the cards

arts.ttl: Graham Potter cancelled West Ham transfer – Didn’t fancy striker despite Hammers reaching agreement
arts.sum: Graham Potter cancelled the arrival of striker Andre Silva at West Ham United, deciding against a move for the RB Leipzig man this month. That’s according to BILD journalist Christian Falk, who reports that it was Potter who ultimately decided against the move. arts.ttl: David Ornstein shares major update on Christopher Nkunku's Chelsea future amid Man Utd and Bayern Munich interest
Nkunku set to stay at Chelsea amid Bayern links
arts.sum: Despite interest from Bayern Munich among others, Christopher Nkunku is reportedly set to remain at Chelsea beyond the transfer deadline.

arts.ttl: Opportunistic club hovering over Chelsea player – Hoping for move elsewhere to fail
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Galatasaray could look to come in for Chelsea forward Joao Felix after signing Alvaro Morata at the weekend. The Portugal international could move in this window after finding his chances limited since arriving from Atletico Madrid in the summer. arts.ttl: Ben Chilwell to Crystal Palace: Contract details revealed, how much of the left-back's wages will Chelsea pay?
arts.sum: Chelsea will still contribute to a significant portion of Ben Chilwell's wages once his loan move to Crystal Palace is complete, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer stance as Chelsea plot audacious deadline-day swoop
arts.sum: Manchester City have been busy during the January transfer window but they have faced interest in their own players while looking to add even more new faces late on

arts.ttl: ‘Interest is confirmed’ – Chelsea ‘stepping up’ efforts to secure deadline day signing, negotiations ongoing
arts.sum: Chelsea are eyeing a late move for AS Saint-Étienne’s Mathis Amougou before the winter market closes later today. That’s at least what L’Equipe are reporting, and they state Blues are keen on securing the 19-year-old’s services. Their title the west London club ‘persist’ in their pursuit of Mathis Amougou.
